name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BakeryMutex ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES state, ticket, next

(* State of each process: 0=idle, 1=trying, 2=critical *)
Init == /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ ticket = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ next = 1

(* Helper: process i has the smallest ticket among those trying *)
Smallest(i) == \A j \in 1..N :
        ticket[i] < ticket[j] \/ (ticket[i] = ticket[j] /\ i < j)

NextState(i) ==
    /\ state[i] = 0
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = 1]
    /\ ticket' = [ticket EXCEPT ![i] = next]
    /\ next' = next + 1
    /\ UNCHANGED <<state, ticket, next>>

EnterCritical(i) ==
    /\ state[i] = 1
    /\ Smallest(i)
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = 2]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<ticket, next>>

ExitCritical(i) ==
    /\ state[i] = 2
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = 0]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<ticket, next>>

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
    NextState(i) \/ EnterCritical(i) \/ ExitCritical(i)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, ticket, next>>

(* Mutual exclusion invariant *)
TypeOK == \A i, j \in 1..N : ~(state[i] = 2 /\ state[j] = 2)

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES participants, state, votes, decision

(* Participants are numbered 1..N *)
participantsDef == participants = 1..N

(* State of each participant: "Init", "Prepared", "Committed", "Aborted" *)
stateDef == state \in [participants -> {"Init", "Prepared", "Committed", "Aborted"}]

(* Votes: mapping from participant to boolean (TRUE for Yes, FALSE for No) *)
votesDef == votes \in [participants -> BOOLEAN]

(* Decision: "Commit", "Abort", or "None" *)
decisionDef == decision \in {"Commit", "Abort", "None"}

(* Initial state: all participants are in Init, no votes, no decision *)
Init == participantsDef /\ stateDef /\ votesDef /\ decisionDef

(* Coordinator sends Prepare to all participants *)
PreparePhase == /\ decision = "None"
                 /\ \A p \in participants: state[p] = "Init"

(* Participant votes Yes or No *)
Vote(p, v) == /\ state[p] = "Prepared"
              /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![p] = v]
              /\ UNCHANGED <<state, decision>>

(* Coordinator decides Commit if all votes are Yes, else Abort *)
DecisionPhase ==
  LET allYes == \A p \in participants: votes[p] = TRUE
  IN decision' = IF allYes THEN "Commit" ELSE "Abort" /\ UNCHANGED <<state, votes>>

(* Participants commit or abort based on decision *)
CommitAbort(p) ==
  /\ state[p] = "Prepared"
  /\ decision' = decision
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = IF decision = "Commit" THEN "Committed" ELSE "Aborted"]
  /\ UNCHANGED votes

Next ==
  \/ \E p \in participants: Vote(p, TRUE)
  \/ \E p \in participants: Vote(p, FALSE)
  \/ DecisionPhase
  \/ \E p \in participants: CommitAbort(p)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<participants, state, votes, decision>>

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, state

(* forks[i] = 0 if fork i is free, 1 if held by philosopher i *)
(* state[i] ∈ {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"} *)

Init == forks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0] /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

Left(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
Right(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

PickUp(i) ==
  /\ forks[Left(i)] = 0
  /\ forks[Right(i)] = 0
  /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![Left(i)] = 1, ![Right(i)] = 1]
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]

PutDown(i) ==
  /\ forks[Left(i)] = 1
  /\ forks[Right(i)] = 1
  /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![Left(i)] = 0, ![Right(i)] = 0]
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

Hungry(i) == state[i] = "hungry"

Think(i) == state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]

Next ==
  \E i \in 1..N :
    (state[i] = "thinking" /\ PickUp(i))
    \/ (state[i] = "eating" /\ PutDown(i))
    \/ (state[i] = "hungry" /\ Think(i))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, state>>

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANT N

VARIABLES num, flag

(* num[i] is the ticket number of process i, 0 if not in bakery *)
(* flag[i] = TRUE if process i is choosing a ticket *)

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          (* choosing phase *)
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
          /\ UNCHANGED num
          (* ticket assignment *)
          /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + Max(Seq(num))]
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]
          (* critical section exit *)
          \/ /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 0]
              /\ flag' = flag
          \/ UNCHANGED <<num, flag>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFO ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

(* q is a sequence of length K, head and tail are indices modulo K, size is the number of elements *)

Init == 
    /\ q = << >>
    /\ head = 0
    /\ tail = 0
    /\ size = 0

Producer ==
    /\ size < K
    /\ q' = Append(q, 1) (* placeholder for actual value *)
    /\ tail' = (tail + 1) % K
    /\ size' = size + 1
    /\ head' = head

Consumer ==
    /\ size > 0
    /\ q' = Tail(q)
    /\ head' = (head + 1) % K
    /\ size' = size - 1
    /\ tail' = tail

Next == Producer \/ Consumer

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, size>>

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, NULL
ASSUME N \in 1..5

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
        /\ votedFor = [i \in 1..N |-> NULL]
        /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "Follower"]

Leader(i) == state[i] = "Leader"
Candidate(i) == state[i] = "Candidate"
Follower(i) == state[i] = "Follower"

RequestVote(i, j) == /\ state[i] = "Candidate"
                    /\ currentTerm = currentTerm[j]
                    /\ votedFor[i] = NULL
                    /\ votedFor' = [votedFor EXCEPT ![i] = j]
                    /\ UNCHANGED <<currentTerm, state>>

VoteGranted(i, j) == /\ state[i] = "Candidate"
                    /\ currentTerm = currentTerm[j]
                    /\ votedFor[i] = j
                    /\ UNCHANGED <<currentTerm, state>>

RequestVoteTimeout(i) == /\ state[i] = "Follower"
                         /\ currentTerm = currentTerm[i]
                         /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "Candidate"]
                         /\ UNCHANGED <<currentTerm, votedFor>>

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          \E j \in 1..N :
            RequestVote(i, j) \/ VoteGranted(i, j) \/ RequestVoteTimeout(i)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

====

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = 0
        /\ writer_active = FALSE

ReadStart == /\ readers' = readers + 1
             /\ UNCHANGED writer_active

ReadEnd == /\ readers' = readers - 1
           /\ UNCHANGED writer_active

WriteStart == /\ writer_active' = TRUE
              /\ UNCHANGED readers

WriteEnd == /\ writer_active' = FALSE
            /\ UNCHANGED readers

Next == \/ ReadStart
        \/ ReadEnd
        \/ WriteStart
        \/ WriteEnd

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

====

name: Distributed Snapshot (Chandy-Lamport)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ChandyLamport ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N, Proc, Chan

VARIABLES state, channel, snapshot, recorded

(* state[p] is the local state of process p
   channel[c] is the sequence of messages on channel c
   snapshot[p] is TRUE if p has recorded its state
   recorded[c] is TRUE if channel c has recorded its state *)

Init == /\ state \in [Proc -> Nat]
        /\ channel \in [Chan -> Seq(Nat)]
        /\ snapshot = [p \in Proc |-> FALSE]
        /\ recorded = [c \in Chan |-> FALSE]

Next == 
    \E p \in Proc :
        /\ ~snapshot[p]
        /\ snapshot' = [snapshot EXCEPT ![p] = TRUE]
        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = state[p] + 1]
    \/ \E c \in Chan :
        /\ ~recorded[c]
        /\ recorded' = [recorded EXCEPT ![c] = TRUE]
        /\ channel' = [channel EXCEPT ![c] = Append(channel[c], 0)]
    \/ \E c \in Chan :
        /\ recorded[c]
        /\ channel' = [channel EXCEPT ![c] = Tail(channel[c])]
        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![Sender(c)] = state[Sender(c)] + 1]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, channel, snapshot, recorded>>

====

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES token, sent

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == 
    /\ token \in 1..N
    /\ sent \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]

(* Initial state: token at node 1, no messages sent *)
Init == 
    /\ token = 1
    /\ sent = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == 
    /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1
    /\ sent' = [sent EXCEPT ![token] = TRUE]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token, sent>>

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values

(* State variables *)
VARIABLE kv  \* Mapping from keys to values, kv

(* Helper to update a single key *)
Update(k, v) == [kv EXCEPT ![k] = v]

(* Initial state: all keys map to 0 *)
Init == /\ kv \in [Keys -> Values]
        /\ \A k \in Keys: kv[k] = 0

(* Actions *)
Put(k, v) == /\ k \in Keys
             /\ v \in Values
             /\ kv' = Update(k, v)

Get(k, v) == /\ k \in Keys
             /\ v = kv[k]
             /\ UNCHANGED <<kv>>

Next == \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values : Put(k, v) \/ Get(k, v)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<kv>>

(* Invariant: kv always maps keys to values *)
TypeOK == kv \in [Keys -> Values]

name: Paxos Single-Decree
generated_spec:
---- MODULE PaxosSingleDecree ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N, M, V

VARIABLES ballots, promises, accepts, chosen

(* ballots: [1..M -> Nat]  -- current ballot number for each proposer
   promises: [1..N -> [ballot: Nat, value: V]]  -- highest promised ballot and value seen by each acceptor
   accepts: [1..N -> [ballot: Nat, value: V]]  -- highest accepted ballot and value by each acceptor
   chosen: [V -> BOOLEAN]  -- whether a value has been chosen *)

Init == ballots = [i \in 1..M |-> 0] /\ 
           promises = [i \in 1..N |-> [ballot |-> 0, value |-> <<>>]] /\ 
           accepts = [i \in 1..N |-> [ballot |-> 0, value |-> <<>>]] /\ 
           chosen = [v \in V |-> FALSE]

Prepare(p) == /\ ballots[p] > 0
              /\ \A a \in 1..N: promises[a].ballot < ballots[p]
              /\ promises' = [promises EXCEPT ![a] = [ballot |-> ballots[p], value |-> <<>>] \A a \in 1..N]
              /\ UNCHANGED <<ballots, accepts, chosen>>

Accept(p, v) == /\ ballots[p] > 0
                /\ \A a \in 1..N: promises[a].ballot = ballots[p]
                /\ accepts' = [accepts EXCEPT ![a] = [ballot |-> ballots[p], value |-> v] \A a \in 1..N]
                /\ UNCHANGED <<ballots, promises, chosen>>

Choose(v) == /\ \E a \in 1..N: accepts[a].value = v
             /\ chosen' = [chosen EXCEPT ![v] = TRUE]
             /\ UNCHANGED <<ballots, promises, accepts>>

Propose(p, v) == /\ ballots' = [ballots EXCEPT ![p] = ballots[p] + 1]
                 /\ Prepare(p)
                 /\ Accept(p, v)
                 /\ Choose(v)

Next == \E p \in 1..M: Propose(p, CHOOSE(V))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<ballots, promises, accepts, chosen>>

====

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS File, MAX_RETRIES

VARIABLES sent, acked, retransmits

(* sent: set of chunks sent
   acked: set of chunks acknowledged
   retransmits: mapping from chunk to number of retransmissions *)

Init == /\ sent = {}
        /\ acked = {}
        /\ retransmits = [c \in File |-> 0]

SendChunk(c) == 
  /\ c \in File
  /\ ~(c \in sent)
  /\ sent' = sent \cup {c}
  /\ retransmits' = [retransmits EXCEPT ![c] = @ + 1]
  /\ UNCHANGED acked

AckChunk(c) == 
  /\ c \in sent
  /\ ~(c \in acked)
  /\ acked' = acked \cup {c}
  /\ UNCHANGED sent
  /\ UNCHANGED retransmits

Retransmit(c) ==
  /\ c \in sent
  /\ ~(c \in acked)
  /\ retransmits[c] < MAX_RETRIES
  /\ retransmits' = [retransmits EXCEPT ![c] = @ + 1]
  /\ UNCHANGED sent
  /\ UNCHANGED acked

NoAck(c) == 
  /\ c \in sent
  /\ ~(c \in acked)
  /\ retransmits[c] >= MAX_RETRIES
  /\ UNCHANGED sent
  /\ UNCHANGED acked
  /\ UNCHANGED retransmits

Next == \E c \in File :
          (SendChunk(c) \/ AckChunk(c) \/ Retransmit(c) \/ NoAck(c))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<sent, acked, retransmits>>

====
